creator: ruud@t-boonproductions.nl
text:
Sorry for the late response i tried to reply but nothing happens when 
replied to the message. Maybe it works this time.

Before 7.0 I used 6.2
I didn't had the error before, but the hw.acpi.thermal wasn't there 
because temperature reading of dual core wasn't supported.
The release notes in 7.0 
(http://www.freebsd.org/releases/7.0R/relnotes.html) are saying that it 
should be supported now...
